text.title: vui-conversation-design Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: appointment-booking dialog with 2 states + 3 noise conditions.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Voice booking flow on custom-LLM agent. Two states: ask-date, confirm.

section.title: Resulting artefact
Outcome
section.p: Validator exits 0. Noise-test report shows accuracy drop ≤10 pp in noisy conditions; ship-ready.
